title: 9 Pcs Mini Silicone Spatula Small Makeup Scraper Set Cosmetic Beauty Tiny Spatulas for Skinny Opening Jars Thin Lotion Bottles Kitchen Bath Skincare Get Last of Makeup Out
description:
About this item
【Efficient Product Usage】The makeup silicone spatula features a long body and narrow head, ensuring easy access to products in jars and narrow spaces, preventing any waste of the last drop of your favorite cosmetics or food items.
【Quality and Safe Material】Crafted from quality silicone material with a stainless steel core, these mini makeup spatulas are safe, non-toxic, and durable. The small jar spatulas are easy to clean and reusable, providing convenience while ensuring safety and hygiene in your daily use.
【Versatile Application】Suitable for a wide range of tasks, these spatulas can be used for cosmetics like lotions, facial masks, lip gloss, as well as everyday items like peanut butter, ketchup, and more. Their versatile design makes them indispensable tools in your kitchen and beauty routine.
【Multiple Sizes for Different Needs】The silicone kitchen utensil set includes three different sizes of spatulas, catering to various container sizes and shapes. Whether it's a small jar or a large bottle, these cosmetic foundation spatulas ensure you can access every bit of your product without any hassle.
【Sufficient Support】Unbox a nine-piece mini skincare spatula set to meet your needs in different occasions at home, including the kitchen, bathroom, and dressing table. You can also share it with your family, roommates, and friends.
reviews_5s:
I initially ordered these mini silicone scrapper set to get all the makeup that I couldn’t otherwise get at the bottom of the containers .
Since I received them I have found so many other uses for them… I am a painter so I use these to get paint out of the small containers, I use them to put glue onto my gemstone crafts, I use them to mix paint colors, also to put oral gel on my doggies teeth (they are soft enough) also to clean in small skinny places (between the faucet & the wall with alittle dish detergent on it, etc… I could go on & on.
Very much worth the cost
I would recommend this product for sooo many uses.I purchased these for my art room to stir/mix paints. The longer ones were a bit large/long for that purpose so I use them in my kitchen as coffee stirrers. Now I do not have a lot of dirty spoons to wash as we stir our coffee, rinse and use again, which should be done with the spoons but I just cannot get the hubs to accept that process.his set of mini silicone spatulas is fantastic! The silicone material makes them versatile for both food and makeup products and they're dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. The dual tips are especially useful for getting out those last little bits from containers, ensuring you don't waste any of your pricey products. Overall, a practical and efficient tool for both the kitchen and the bathroom.If you’re always trying to get that last bit of salad dressing, etc from a bottle or jar, then these silicone spatulas are for you. I am a frugal person and with food prices these days, it benefits me to use these spatulas. There are two ends. One end is a spatula (better for scraping peanut butter) and the other end is a spoon (better for liquids as it bends more easily). They are easily cleaned by running them through the dishwasher. There are 9 in the order (three each of 6”, 9”, and 12”). I was able to scape up mustard and peanut butter from jars easily. They can also be used for lotion or makeup bottles. Have to get that every last bit of the anti-aging cream!

If I had to give a negative, it would be that the silicone does stain a little bit. I used the 12” spoon to try to get Sriracha sauce out, and the spoon did stain a tiny bit. It was too faint to be picked up by my camera.
Otherwise, I really recommend this product.Ware und Lieferung top
reviews_1s: Easily broken when you try to scoop the bottom of the bottle..Sorry habe die Spatel wieder zurückgeschickt, war leider nicht von der Qualität überzeugt, Spatel zu instabil
